data.title: World Liberty Financial Staking Ethereum, Diving Deeper Into DeFi
data.description:
World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has been rapidly establishing itself as one of the dominant firms in the crypto sphere. Its latest activity which includes staking Ethereum highlights the company’s push deeper into the DeFi segment. World Liberty Financial almost becoming a household name in the crypto segment thanks to its close association with President Trump. […]

data.title: Ethereum Devs Clash Over Looming Upgrades

Ethereum's core developers are racing to finalize two significant network upgrades, with the first major milestone just days away.

data.title: Abu Dhabi Reveals $436.9 Million Investment in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
The post Abu Dhabi Reveals $436.9 Million Investment in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
In a recent update, Abu Dhabi on Friday, revealed a massive $436.9 million stake in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin ETF (IBIT) as of December 31, 2024. The investment was made through Mubadala Investments, one of the country’s sovereign wealth funds, according to a 13F filing...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/abu-dhabi-reveals-436-9-million-investment-in-blackrocks-bitcoin-etf/

data.title: Solana Memecoin Platform Pump.fun Rolls Out iOS & Android App
data.description:
TL;DR Pump.fun has launched a mobile app compatible with iOS and Android, allowing users to buy, sell, and create memecoins for free. The app is not available in the UK, as the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has issued warnings due to lack of authorization and scam risks. Despite legal issues in the US and regulatory ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/solana-memecoin-platform-pump-fun-rolls-out-ios-android-app/

data.title: Bitcoin Surpasses 98000 USDT With 24-Hour Increase
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin has surpassed the 98,000 USDT mark, currently trading at 98,031 USDT. This represents a 24-hour increase of 2.23%.
